---
title: "Linguistic Features Predict Acquisition Bias?"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-14"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(glmnet)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)
set.seed(1)
```


# Preparation

```{r}
bias_raw <- readr::read_csv(here("Data", "bias_WS_Ref_TotalVocab_2025Jun18.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
feat_raw <- readr::read_csv(here("Data", "LinguisticFeatures.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
rel_raw  <- readr::read_csv(here("Data", "Relevance.csv"),  show_col_types = FALSE)

bias <- bias_raw %>% mutate(
  language = str_squish(language),
  form     = str_squish(form),
  lexical_class = str_squish(lexical_class),
  measure  = str_squish(measure))
feat <- feat_raw %>% mutate(language = str_squish(language))
rel <- rel_raw %>% mutate(featureTag = str_squish(featureTag))

langs_in_feat <- feat %>% distinct(language)

bias_ws <- bias %>% filter(form == "WS") %>%
  semi_join(langs_in_feat, by = "language")

# Check
bias_ws %>% count(lexical_class, measure) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

bias_ws %>% count(language, lexical_class) %>%
  filter(n > 1)
```


```{r}
build_ds <- function(target_class = c("Nouns", "Verbs", "Adjectives")) {
  target_class <- match.arg(target_class)
  # Relevance column names are "Noun"/"Verb"/"Adjective" in your Relevance.csv
  rel_col <- case_when(
    target_class == "Nouns"      ~ "Noun",
    target_class == "Verbs"      ~ "Verb",
    target_class == "Adjectives" ~ "Adjective")

  # pick relevant feature names
  rel_feats <- rel %>% filter(.data[[rel_col]] == "Relevant") %>%
    pull(featureTag) %>%
    unique()

  # keep only feature columns that actually exist in feat
  rel_feats <- intersect(rel_feats, names(feat))

  # outcome: bias mean for this lexical class (WS only, languages filtered already)
  y <- bias_ws %>%
    filter(lexical_class == target_class) %>%
    select(language, y = mean)

  # x: selected features
  x <- feat %>% select(language, all_of(rel_feats))

  # join
  ds <- y %>% inner_join(x, by = "language")

  list(
    data = ds,
    features = rel_feats)
}

ds_noun <- build_ds("Nouns")
ds_verb <- build_ds("Verbs")
ds_adj  <- build_ds("Adjectives")

# quick checks
glimpse(ds_noun$data)
glimpse(ds_verb$data)
glimpse(ds_adj$data)

# number of languages retained
tibble(
  lexical_class = c("Nouns", "Verbs", "Adjectives"),
  n_lang = c(nrow(ds_noun$data), nrow(ds_verb$data), nrow(ds_adj$data)),
  n_feat = c(length(ds_noun$features), length(ds_verb$features), length(ds_adj$features))) %>% 
  print()
```


```{r}
keep_complete <- function(ds) {
  ds$data <- ds$data %>% drop_na()
  ds
}

ds_noun_cc <- keep_complete(ds_noun)
ds_verb_cc <- keep_complete(ds_verb)
ds_adj_cc  <- keep_complete(ds_adj)

# check number of languages
tibble(
  lexical_class = c("Nouns", "Verbs", "Adjectives"),
  n_lang = c(
    nrow(ds_noun_cc$data),
    nrow(ds_verb_cc$data),
    nrow(ds_adj_cc$data))) %>% print()


factorize_predictors <- function(ds) {
  ds$data <- ds$data %>%
    mutate(across(-c(language, y), as.factor))
  ds
}

ds_noun_cc <- factorize_predictors(ds_noun_cc)
ds_verb_cc <- factorize_predictors(ds_verb_cc)
ds_adj_cc  <- factorize_predictors(ds_adj_cc)

# Change reference level:
ds_noun_cc$data <- ds_noun_cc$data %>% 
  mutate(wordOrder = forcats::fct_relevel(wordOrder, "SVO"))
         # orderAdposN = forcats::fct_relevel(orderAdposN, "Prepositions"))
ds_verb_cc$data <- ds_verb_cc$data %>% 
  mutate(wordOrder = forcats::fct_relevel(wordOrder, "SVO"))
ds_adj_cc$data <- ds_adj_cc$data %>% 
  mutate(wordOrder = forcats::fct_relevel(wordOrder, "SVO"))

# Intercept (reference level) -> check ds_XXXX_cc
```



# Function development

## Outer CV - LOOCV + Elastic Net

```{r}
make_design <- function(df) {
  mm <- model.matrix(y ~ . - language, data = df)
  list(
    X = mm[, -1, drop = FALSE],  # drop intercept
    y = df$y,
    language = df$language
  )
}


outer_loocv_skeleton <- function(ds) {
  design <- make_design(ds$data)

  n <- length(design$y)

  results <- map_dfr(seq_len(n), function(i) {
    test_lang <- design$language[i]

    # split
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), i)
    test_idx  <- i

    X_train <- design$X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- design$y[train_idx]

    X_test  <- design$X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- design$y[test_idx]

    # -----
    # Later we will add：
    #   - Inner CV
    #   - alpha / lambda selection
    #   - Elastic Net learning
    #   - y_pred calculation
    # -----

    tibble(
      language = test_lang,
      y_true   = y_test,
      y_pred   = NA_real_)
  })
  results
}

# Check functions
res_noun_loocv <- outer_loocv_skeleton(ds_noun_cc)
res_verb_loocv <- outer_loocv_skeleton(ds_verb_cc)
res_adj_loocv  <- outer_loocv_skeleton(ds_adj_cc)

glimpse(res_noun_loocv)
```



## Inner CV - 5-fold CV + Elastic Net

```{r}
select_alpha_lambda <- function(
  X_train,
  y_train,
  alpha_grid = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
  nfolds = 5) {

  cv_results <- map_dfr(alpha_grid, function(a) {
    set.seed(123)
    cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      alpha = a,
      nfolds = nfolds,
      standardize = TRUE)

    tibble(
      alpha = a,
      lambda_1se = cvfit$lambda.1se,
      cv_error   = min(cvfit$cvm))
  })

  best <- cv_results %>%
    filter(cv_error == min(cv_error)) %>%
    arrange(alpha) %>%
    slice(1)

  list(
    alpha = best$alpha,
    lambda = best$lambda_1se,
    cv_table = cv_results)
}

# Check the function
design_noun <- make_design(ds_noun_cc$data)

test_fit <- select_alpha_lambda(
  X_train = design_noun$X,
  y_train = design_noun$y)

test_fit$alpha
test_fit$lambda
test_fit$cv_table

```


## Final function

```{r}
outer_loocv_elastic_net <- function(ds,
                                    alpha_grid = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
                                    nfolds_inner = 5) {
  design <- make_design(ds$data)
  n <- length(design$y)

  results <- map_dfr(seq_len(n), function(i) {

    # split
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(n), i)
    test_idx  <- i

    X_train <- design$X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_train <- design$y[train_idx]

    X_test  <- design$X[test_idx, , drop = FALSE]
    y_test  <- design$y[test_idx]

    # ---- inner CV: alpha / lambda selection ----
    tuning <- select_alpha_lambda(
      X_train = X_train,
      y_train = y_train,
      alpha_grid = alpha_grid,
      nfolds = nfolds_inner)

    # ---- fit Elastic Net with selected hyperparameters ----
    fit <- glmnet(
      x = X_train,
      y = y_train,
      alpha = tuning$alpha,
      lambda = tuning$lambda,
      standardize = TRUE)

    # ---- prediction ----
    y_pred <- as.numeric(predict(fit, X_test))

    tibble(
      language = design$language[i],
      y_true   = y_test,
      y_pred   = y_pred,
      alpha    = tuning$alpha,
      lambda   = tuning$lambda)
  })

  results
}
```



# Analysis

```{r}
res_noun <- outer_loocv_elastic_net(ds_noun_cc)
res_verb <- outer_loocv_elastic_net(ds_verb_cc)
res_adj  <- outer_loocv_elastic_net(ds_adj_cc)

# Quick check
summary(res_noun$y_pred) # any values?
count(res_noun, alpha)   # alpha distribution
res_noun %>%             # real values vs. predicted values
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean((y_true - y_pred)^2)),
    mae  = mean(abs(y_true - y_pred)))
```


## Choose hyper parameters

```{r}
# alpha: Elastic Net mixing parameter
# 0 = Ridge regression (L2 penalty only)
# 1 = Lasso regression (L1 penalty only)
# 0 < alpha < 1 = Elastic Net (combination of L1 and L2)
# Smaller alpha -> more stable coefficients under multicollinearity

choose_alpha <- function(res_loocv) {
  res_loocv %>%
    count(alpha) %>%
    arrange(desc(n), alpha) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    pull(alpha)
}

alpha_noun <- choose_alpha(res_noun)
alpha_verb <- choose_alpha(res_verb)
alpha_adj  <- choose_alpha(res_adj)

count(res_noun, alpha)
count(res_verb, alpha)
count(res_adj,  alpha)
```



```{r}
# lambda: regularization strength
# Larger lambda -> stronger shrinkage of coefficients
# Controls model complexity and prevents overfitting
# Selected via cross-validation (lambda.1se for stability)

fit_final_cv <- function(ds, alpha, nfolds = 5) {
  design <- make_design(ds$data)

  cvfit <- cv.glmnet(
    x = design$X,
    y = design$y,
    alpha = alpha,
    nfolds = nfolds,
    standardize = TRUE)

  list(
    cvfit = cvfit,
    lambda = cvfit$lambda.1se,
    design = design)
}

final_noun <- fit_final_cv(ds_noun_cc, alpha_noun)
final_verb <- fit_final_cv(ds_verb_cc, alpha_verb)
final_adj  <- fit_final_cv(ds_adj_cc,  alpha_adj)
```



## Fit final elastic net

```{r}
# Hyperparameters (alpha, lambda) are tuned in inner CV,
# while outer LOOCV is used solely for unbiased performance evaluation.

# Representative alpha is chosen as the most frequently selected value
# across outer LOOCV folds, for fitting the final interpretative model

# Alpha is tuned within inner CV for prediction in each LOOCV fold.
# The representative alpha (mode across folds) is used only
# to fit the final model for interpretation.

fit_elastic_net <- function(final_obj, alpha) {
  glmnet(
    x = final_obj$design$X,
    y = final_obj$design$y,
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = final_obj$lambda,
    standardize = TRUE)
}

model_noun <- fit_elastic_net(final_noun, alpha_noun)
model_verb <- fit_elastic_net(final_verb, alpha_verb)
model_adj  <- fit_elastic_net(final_adj,  alpha_adj)
```


## Extract coefficients (point est)

```{r}
extract_coef <- function(model, alpha, lambda) {
  coef_mat <- coef(model, s = lambda)

  tibble(
    term = rownames(coef_mat),
    estimate = as.numeric(coef_mat)) %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(estimate))) %>%
    mutate(alpha = alpha)
}

coef_noun <- extract_coef(model_noun, alpha_noun, final_noun$lambda)
coef_verb <- extract_coef(model_verb, alpha_verb, final_verb$lambda)
coef_adj  <- extract_coef(model_adj,  alpha_adj,  final_adj$lambda)

coef_noun
coef_verb
coef_adj

```


## Bootstrap coefficitnt

```{r}
# Confidence intervals were obtained via case bootstrap (B = 1000)
# on the final ridge regression model with fixed alpha and lambda.
# This provides uncertainty estimates for regularized coefficients,
# which are not analytically available in glmnet.

bootstrap_coef <- function(ds, alpha, lambda, B = 1000, seed = 123) {
  set.seed(seed)

  design <- make_design(ds$data)
  n <- length(design$y)
  p <- ncol(design$X)
  coef_names <- colnames(design$X)

  coef_mat <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = B, ncol = p,
                     dimnames = list(NULL, coef_names))

  for (b in seq_len(B)) {
    idx <- sample(seq_len(n), size = n, replace = TRUE)

    fit <- glmnet(
      x = design$X[idx, , drop = FALSE],
      y = design$y[idx],
      alpha = alpha,
      lambda = lambda,
      standardize = TRUE)

    coef_mat[b, ] <- as.numeric(coef(fit, s = lambda))[-1]
  }
  coef_mat
}

boot_noun <- bootstrap_coef(
  ds_noun_cc,
  alpha = alpha_noun,
  lambda = final_noun$lambda,
  B = 1000)

boot_verb <- bootstrap_coef(
  ds_verb_cc,
  alpha = alpha_verb,
  lambda = final_verb$lambda,
  B = 1000)

boot_adj <- bootstrap_coef(
  ds_adj_cc,
  alpha = alpha_adj,
  lambda = final_adj$lambda,
  B = 1000)
```


```{r}
summarise_boot <- function(coef_df, boot_mat) {
  coef_df %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      ci_lower = quantile(boot_mat[, term], 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
      ci_upper = quantile(boot_mat[, term], 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup()
}

coef_noun_ci <- summarise_boot(coef_noun, boot_noun)
coef_verb_ci <- summarise_boot(coef_verb, boot_verb)
coef_adj_ci  <- summarise_boot(coef_adj,  boot_adj)

coef_noun_ci %>% print(n=30)
coef_verb_ci
coef_adj_ci
```



# Visualization

```{r}
coef_noun_ci <- coef_noun_ci %>% mutate(lexical_class = "Noun")
coef_verb_ci <- coef_verb_ci %>% mutate(lexical_class = "Verb")
coef_adj_ci <- coef_adj_ci %>% mutate(lexical_class = "Adjective")

coef_plot <- bind_rows(coef_noun_ci, coef_verb_ci, coef_adj_ci)

coef_plot <- coef_plot %>%
  mutate(term_clean = term %>% str_squish(),
    term_label = case_when(
      # --- Articles (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^articleBoth")       ~ "Articles: both",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^articleDefinite")   ~ "Articles: definite-only",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^articleIndefinite") ~ "Articles: indefinite-only",

      # --- Case number (baseline = none) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^numCase2~4") ~ "Case number: 2–4",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^numCase5~")  ~ "Case number: ≥5",

      # --- Case position (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posCaseAffixCaseSuffix")         ~ "Case position: suffixal",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posCaseAffixPrepositionalClitics") ~ "Case position: prepositional clitics",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posCaseAffixPostpositionalClitics") ~ "Case position: postpositional clitics",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posCaseAffixMixed")              ~ "Case position: mixed",

      # --- Plural marking (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posNomPluralPluralPrefix")   ~ "Plural marking: prefixal",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posNomPluralPluralSuffix")   ~ "Plural marking: suffixal",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posNomPluralMixed")          ~ "Plural marking: mixed",

      # --- Nominal plurality (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^nomPlural") ~ "Nominal plurality: present",

      # --- Numeral classifiers (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^classifier") ~ "Numeral classifiers: present",

      # --- Adposition–NP order (baseline = no dominant order, if present in your coding) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdposNPrepositions")  ~ "Adp–NP order: prepositional",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdposNPostpositions") ~ "Adp–NP order: postpositional",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdposN")              ~ "Adp–NP order: no dominant order",

      # --- Tense marking (baseline = none) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^tenseBoth") ~ "Tense marking: both",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^tensePast") ~ "Tense marking: past-only",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^tense")     ~ "Tense marking: none",

      # --- Verbal person marking (baseline = none) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^vPersonAgentPatient") ~ "Verbal person marking: agent–patient",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^vPersonAgent$|^vPersonAgent(?=[A-Z])") ~ "Verbal person marking: agent",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^vPerson")             ~ "Verbal person marking: none",

      # --- Tense–aspect position (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posTenseAspectAffixTenseAspectPrefixes") ~ "Tense–aspect position: prefixal",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posTenseAspectAffixTenseAspectSuffixes") ~ "Tense–aspect position: suffixal",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posTenseAspectAffixMixed")               ~ "Tense–aspect position: mixed",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^posTenseAspectAffix")                    ~ "Tense–aspect position: absent",

      # --- Verbal suppletion (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^supplTenseAspect") ~ "Verbal suppletion: present",

      # --- Comparative marking (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^compDeg") ~ "Comparative marking: present",

      # --- Verbal adjectives (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^(predicativeAdj|predAdj|verbalAdj|adjAsVerb)") ~ "Verbal adjectives: present",

      # --- Word order (baseline = no dominant order, if present in your coding) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^wordOrderSVO") ~ "Word order: SVO",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^wordOrderSOV") ~ "Word order: SOV",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^wordOrderVSO") ~ "Word order: VSO",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^wordOrder")    ~ "Word order: no dominant order",

      # --- Pro-drop (baseline = absent) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^proDrop|^prodDrop|^prodrop") ~ "Pro-drop: present",

      # --- Adjective–noun order (baseline = no dominant order, if present in your coding) ---
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdjN.*Adj-N") ~ "Adjective–noun order: Adj–N",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdjN.*N-Adj") ~ "Adjective–noun order: N–Adj",
      str_detect(term_clean, "^orderAdjN")        ~ "Adjective–noun order: no dominant order",

      TRUE ~ term_clean))

# quick check (optional)
coef_plot %>% distinct(term, term_label) -> tmp
# View(tmp)
# write.csv(tmp, file="term_label.csv")
```


## Forest plot

```{r}
coef_plot2 <- coef_plot %>%
  mutate(
    significant = if_else(ci_lower > 0 | ci_upper < 0, "CI excludes 0", "CI includes 0"),
    pred = case_when(
      str_detect(term_label, "^Articles:") ~ "Articles",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Case number:") ~ "Case number",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Case position:") ~ "Case position",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Plural marking:") ~ "Plural marking",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Nominal plurality:") ~ "Nominal plurality",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Numeral classifiers:") ~ "Numeral classifiers",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Adposition–NP order:") ~ "Adposition–NP order",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Tense marking:") ~ "Tense marking",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Verbal person marking:") ~ "Verbal person marking",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Tense–aspect position:") ~ "Tense–aspect position",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Verbal suppletion:") ~ "Verbal suppletion",  
      str_detect(term_label, "^Comparative marking:") ~ "Comparative marking",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Verbal adjectives:") ~ "Verbal adjectives",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Word order:") ~ "Word order",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Pro-drop:") ~ "Pro-drop",
      str_detect(term_label, "^Adjective–noun order:") ~ "Adjective–noun order",
      TRUE ~ "Other")) %>%
  group_by(lexical_class) %>%
  mutate(
    pred = factor(pred, levels = c(
      "Articles","Case number","Case position","Plural marking","Nominal plurality",
      "Numeral classifiers","Adposition–NP order",
      "Tense marking","Verbal person marking","Tense–aspect position","Verbal suppletion",
      "Comparative marking","Verbal adjectives",
      "Word order","Pro-drop","Adjective–noun order","Other")),
    bonus = case_when(
      pred == "Case number" & str_detect(term_label, "2–4$") ~ 10,
      pred == "Case number" & str_detect(term_label, "≥5$")  ~ 50,
      TRUE ~ 0),
    sort_key = 1000 * as.numeric(pred) + bonus + (-estimate),
    term_label = fct_rev(fct_reorder(term_label, sort_key))) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(term_label_md = str_replace(as.character(term_label), "^([^:]+):", "<b>\\1</b>:"),
         term_label_md = factor(term_label_md,
                                levels = str_replace(levels(term_label), "^([^:]+):", "<b>\\1</b>:")))

cols <- c(Noun = "#2C7BB6", Verb = "#1A9850", Adjective = "#D95F02")

base_th <- theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 15),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(linewidth = 0.15, color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(linewidth = 0.25, color = "grey87"),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
    # axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11, color="gray15", lineheight = 0.92, margin = margin(r = 1)),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(size = 11, color = "gray15", lineheight = 0.92, margin = margin(r = 1)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10, color="gray15"),
    # axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, color="gray15", face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 2)),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 11, color="gray15", margin = margin(t = 2)),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(5, "pt"),    
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1))

# --- Nouns ---
df_n <- coef_plot2 %>% filter(lexical_class == "Noun")
# ggplot(df_n, aes(x = estimate, y = term_label)) +
p_n <- ggplot(df_n, aes(x = estimate, y = term_label_md)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper, linewidth = significant, alpha = significant),
                 height = 0.22, color = cols["Noun"]) +
  geom_point(aes(size = significant, alpha = significant), color = cols["Noun"]) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, color = "grey30") +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 3.1, "CI includes 0" = 1.6), guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1.0, "CI includes 0" = 0.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1, "CI includes 0" = 0.35), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Nouns", x = "Coefficient estimate (×0.001)", y = NULL) +
  # scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.08)))+
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-6e-3, -3e-3, 0, 3e-3, 6e-3), labels = c("-6", "-3", "0", "3", "6"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.10))) +
  base_th
p_n
# ggsave("Fig2_Typological_Noun.png", width = 5, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# --- Verbs ---
df_v <- coef_plot2 %>% filter(lexical_class == "Verb")
p_v <- ggplot(df_v, aes(x = estimate, y = term_label_md)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper, linewidth = significant, alpha = significant),
                 height = 0.22, color = cols["Verb"]) +
  geom_point(aes(size = significant, alpha = significant), color = cols["Verb"]) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, color = "grey30") +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 3.1, "CI includes 0" = 1.6), guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1.0, "CI includes 0" = 0.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1, "CI includes 0" = 0.35), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Verbs", x = "Coefficient estimate (×0.0001)", y = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-2e-4, -1e-4, 0, 1e-4, 2e-4), labels = c("-2", "-1", "0", "1", "2"),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.10))) +
  base_th
p_v
# ggsave("Fig2_Typological_Verb.png", width = 5.2, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# --- Adjectives ---
df_a <- coef_plot2 %>% filter(lexical_class == "Adjective")
p_a <- ggplot(df_a, aes(x = estimate, y = term_label_md)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper, linewidth = significant, alpha = significant),
                 height = 0.22, color = cols["Adjective"]) +
  geom_point(aes(size = significant, alpha = significant), color = cols["Adjective"]) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.75, color = "grey30") +
  scale_size_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 3.1, "CI includes 0" = 1.6), guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1.0, "CI includes 0" = 0.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c("CI excludes 0" = 1, "CI includes 0" = 0.35), guide = "none") +
  labs(title = "Adjectives", x = "Coefficient estimate (×0.0001)", y = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(-1e-4, 0, 1e-4, 2e-4), labels = c("-1", "0", "1", "2"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.10))) +
  base_th
p_a
# ggsave("Fig2_Typological_Adjective.png", width = 4.5, height = 2.1, dpi = 300)

p_all <- p_n / plot_spacer() / p_v / plot_spacer() / p_a + plot_layout(heights = c(6.3, 0.03, 3.9, 0.03, 1.7)) 
p_all
ggsave(filename = here("Figures", "typo_preds.png"), plot = p_all, width = 4.8, height = 6.3+3.9+1.7-0.2, dpi = 300)
write.csv(coef_plot2, here("Results", "typo_preds.csv"), row.names=FALSE)
```



# MCA (Multiple Correspondence Analysis) --- still in progress

```{r}
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
```


```{r}
vars <- names(feat)[match("wordOrder", names(feat)) : match("predicativeAdj", names(feat))]
feat_mca <- feat %>% mutate(across(all_of(vars), ~ as.factor(.)))

# run usual MCA
set.seed(1)
res_mca <- MCA(feat_mca[, vars, drop = FALSE], graph = FALSE)

fviz_screeplot(res_mca, addlabels = TRUE)

# Example：Contributions of Dim1, Dim2
fviz_contrib(res_mca, choice = "var", axes = 1, top = 20)
fviz_contrib(res_mca, choice = "var", axes = 2, top = 20)

## ---- 5) 数値で見たい場合（寄与%をテーブル化） ----
contrib_var <- as.data.frame(res_mca$var$contrib)  # 行=カテゴリ水準（モダリティ）単位
head(contrib_var)

# 変数単位で寄与をまとめたい場合（モダリティ寄与を変数ごとに合算）
contrib_varname_dim1 <- res_mca$var$contrib %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("modality") %>%
  mutate(var = sub("=.*$", "", modality)) %>%   # "var=level" 形式を想定
  group_by(var) %>%
  summarise(Dim1 = sum(`Dim 1`), Dim2 = sum(`Dim 2`), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(Dim1))

contrib_varname_dim1
```





```{r}
feat
```
